title: Budget Breakdown Report
scenario: Generate a budget breakdown report for a company with multiple departments, projects, and expenses. The report should include departmental budgets, project expenses, and total expenses. The report should be suitable for a quarterly review and should accommodate 10 departments and 20 projects.
constraints: Must use a consistent format for departmental budgets and project expenses
Must include a note for variance analysis
Must include a note for budget projections

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the report adheres to the given constraints.
Check if budget figures are accurate and complete.
Check if variance analysis and budget projections are accurate and complete.
